name: agents-role
description: New 'Agents' role: external real-estate agents log into a scoped partner portal to manage their own buyer interests (own clients full detail; all other lots/units masked status-only). Seafields + Branscombe. Invite-only; request-only holds; status enquiries to admin.

env_vars.name: AGENT_INVITE_TOKEN_SECRET
env_vars.description: HMAC secret signing single-use agent invite tokens (14-day expiry). Mirrors the team-admin invite pattern.
env_vars.where: Generate locally and paste into Vercel env

env_vars.name: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
env_vars.description: Server-side agent provisioning (create auth user on invite accept) + RLS-bypass admin ops. Already present.

env_vars.name: RESEND_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Invite emails + agent->admin status-enquiry emails. Already present.

env_vars.name: RESEND_FROM_EMAIL
env_vars.description: Sender override; defaults to the verified updates.corporateaisolutions.com subdomain.

external_setup.title: Agents schema + RLS migration
external_setup.description: Migration creating the agents table, agent_id FK on both registration tables, agent hold-request fields, agent_enquiries, and the RLS policies that mask identity on non-owned lots/units.
steps: agents (id, name, email, agency, estate_access text[], active, invited_by, created_at)
ALTER seafields_registrations + branscombe_registrations ADD agent_id uuid NULL REFERENCES agents(id)
Hold-request fields (hold_requested_by_agent_id, hold_requested_at, hold_status) on lots/units OR a lot_hold_requests log table
agent_enquiries (id, agent_id, estate, lot_or_unit, message, created_at, resolved_at) — optional in phase 1 (email-only acceptable)
RLS: agents SELECT own registrations (agent_id = auth uid mapping); masked projection for all other lots/units
Apply via supabase db push per the migrations rule

external_setup.title: Supabase Auth — agent portal redirect
external_setup.description: Agents authenticate through the existing Supabase auth + /api/auth/confirm flow. Confirm the agent portal landing route is covered by the redirect allowlist and middleware allowlist.
steps: Confirm the agent portal route (e.g. /agent or /agent/login) resolves post-auth
Confirm /api/auth/confirm is in middleware allowlist (already true for admin)
